status_update: Scaffolded this standalone follow-up to type the isolation helper clusters that still sit under file-wide `@ts-nocheck` after 04-20-skill-test-sandbox-type-hardening.

Extracted typed isolation helpers into server/domain/skill-test/isolation-typed-helpers.ts, tightened the isolation/tool-policy/case-context contracts in sandbox-tool-contract.ts, and rewired isolation.ts to consume typed execution/egress/publish-gate/store helpers without changing the host-loop + sandbox-tools semantics.
